title: Vongsense
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Maybe I did make some sort of mental linkage, but if I did I think it's more of a translation from one to another.|[[Anakin Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Vongsense''' was a power which enabled a being to sense [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathically]]. This ability was discovered by [[Anakin Solo]] after he attuned a [[lambent]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] to him and then repaired his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] using it.

==Overview==
This ability was fairly rare, although it was also possessed by [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Finn Galfridian]] and by Anakin's brother [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]]. This was because forming it sometimes required a physical or mental connection of sorts to Yuuzhan Vong [[biot]]echnology. In Anakin's case, this was the lambent crystal; in Tahiri's, the vivisection she had suffered as the captive of [[Mezhan Kwaad]]; and in Jacen's, the [[Solo Project|similar ordeal]] he had undergone at the hands of [[Vergere]].

Vongsense proved to be an asset to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in winning the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

Some Jedi practitioners would have to temporarily abandon their connection with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in order to use Vongsense. [[Karness Muur]],<ref name=":0">[[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]]</ref> Allana Solo,<ref name=":1">[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']]</ref> and the One Sith did not.<ref name=":2">[[Legacy (2006) 15|''Legacy'' (2006) 15]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Despite most other cases of Vongsense being a result of a connection to Yuuzhan Vong biotechnology, Finn Galfridian's ability to use Vongsense was not explained. Karness Muur (while possessing Celeste Morne),<ref name=":0" /> Allana Solo,<ref name=":1" /> and most One Sith also did not have such a connection.<ref name=":2" />
